---
title: "‘The Two Beauties of the Camberwell Assemblies, 1778’"
---

## ‘The Two Beauties of the Camberwell Assemblies, 1778’

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1860
**Imprint:** <i>Once A Week</i>   (20 October 1860) 459- 463.

### Notes

Initially CMY accepted the story for the <i>MP</i>, but she then returned it.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
